div.p: The First Committee of the United Nations General Assembly met on Monday, December 18, from 10:45 a. m. to 12:40 p. m. and approved by a vote of 50 to 5, with 4 abstentions, a proposal to adjourn until the three-member Group on Cease-fire in Korea was able to submit a report; for the record, see U.N. document A/C.1/SR.418. This was the last meeting of the committee in 1950, as the report of the Entezam Group was submitted on January 2, 1951; see U.N. document A/C.1/643.
